title: Fluffy Light Chinese Citrus Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and fluffy plant-based dish marinated in balsamic vinegar for added flavor, served as a light lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: any color can be used, green is best for this dish

instructions: Wash and cut vegetables into small pieces.
Mix balsamic vinegar, soy sauce, water, olive oil, sugar, and salt in a bowl. Add minced garlic and mix well.
Submerge the vegetables in the marinade for at least 30 minutes before stir-frying to enhance flavor.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of oil. Add remaining 2 tablespoons of oil once it's hot.
Add marinated vegetables and cook until they turn bright green and crispy, stirring occasionally for about 5-7 minutes.
Squeeze the juice from half of a lemon to season the dish before serving.
